text_block_list.name: Spe & Kitasan
text_block_list.text: Let's respect the elderly!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Darn straight! Check it out!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wait, why do we have to be respectful? Just
'cause it's Respect for the Aged Day doesn't make
it the law.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Respect for the Aged Day is when we appreciate
all the elders in our lives! My dad told me it's
important to honor your older relatives.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Then let's find someone we feel a close
connection with and show them our respect!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, when is this red light going to change?! I'm
going to be so late...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen, are you waiting for the traffic light? I'll
hold your belongings for you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I can hold those myself. But be a darling and
hang out with me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Today, we're going all out on a five-hour
karaoke-thon! ♪ You'll do the vocals, and I'll do
the dancing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huuuuh?! The elderly have more pep than me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, Bakushin O! If you ever need some help...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, it's Kita! Wait... What did I come here to do
again?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You came here to... Bakushin, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! That's right! BAKUSHIN, BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hold on! Bakushin O, you just Bakushined a
moment ago, didn't you?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, McQueen! Got achy shoulders? I can always
set them right with a good ol' dropkick!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I will not be requiring that! At least pretend to
show some kindness!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, all the "old folks" we feel connections with
were pretty lively.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They sure were. Maybe we should go visit our real
grandparents next time!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Agreed! I'll have to do a handstand walk through
the shopping district for my next target.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You will not, Gold Ship! I'm not having anymore of your crazy antics!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Gyaaaah! It's the witch! Here comes the foul
witch, Mejiro McCruel! The village will be burned
to ashes!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You know... if anyone's the elder here, it's
probably Golshi. It's like she's from ancient times.
